summary: Sets or unsets offer template open question template
description: Sets or unsets offer template open question template. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/open_question_templates/assign. Required parameters: offer_template_id, open_question_template_id, company_id.

params.name: open_question_template_id
params.description: Open Question template ID; pass null to unset
